hero.headline: Building Digital Products That Move Businesses Forward
hero.subtitle: I design and develop polished, business ready web and mobile apps, from concept to launch. Every project is built for real users, real results, and real growth.
about.headline: Developer, Designer, Builder
about.description: I'm Allen Ruiz, the developer behind Bluebonnet Tech. I specialize in building polished digital products that solve real business problems, from responsive web platforms to native mobile apps. I care about clean architecture, thoughtful design, and shipping work that makes a measurable difference for the people who use it.
about.highlight1: Full stack web and mobile development
about.highlight2: UI/UX design with a business first mindset
services.headline: Services
services.subtitle: From design to deployment, I build digital products that look sharp, work smoothly, and drive results.
services.uiux.title: UI/UX Design
services.uiux.description: User centered interfaces designed for clarity, accessibility, and conversion. Every screen and interaction is intentional.
services.web.title: Web Development
services.web.description: Responsive, performant web applications built with modern frameworks. SEO friendly, fast, and production ready.
services.mobile.title: Mobile Development
services.mobile.description: Cross platform and native mobile apps that feel polished on every device. Built for iOS and Android from day one.
services.demos.title: Business Demos
services.demos.description: Fully functional demo applications that showcase what's possible for your business. Ready to pitch, present, or iterate on.
services.support.title: Ongoing Support
services.support.description: Post launch maintenance, performance monitoring, and feature updates to keep your product running at its best.
work.headline: Projects
work.subtitle: A selection of apps built with the Bluebonnet Tech platform, each one designed to solve a real business need.
projects.tropikala.name: Tropikala Smoothie Co.
projects.tropikala.summary: A vibrant tropical smoothie shop with online menu browsing, shopping cart, promotions, and a full admin dashboard for business operations.
projects.tropikala.businessProblem: Smoothie shops and small food and beverage businesses rely on foot traffic and lack a polished digital presence for menu browsing, online ordering, and business management.
projects.tropikala.overview: Tropikala Smoothie Co. is a demo application showcasing a modern digital storefront for a tropical smoothie brand. It features a vibrant landing page, browsable menu with nutrition data, shopping cart, promotions system, and a complete admin dashboard, all built on the Bluebonnet Tech core platform.
projects.tropikala.challenge: Building a full stack application that serves both customers and business operators equally well. The customer experience needed to feel fun, vibrant, and inviting, while the admin dashboard required powerful product, order, and promotion management without feeling overwhelming.
projects.tropikala.solution: A dual experience tenant application built on the Bluebonnet Tech core. The customer side features a warm coral/teal palette with engaging product cards, category filtering, and a cart flow. The admin side provides order management, smoothie catalog editing, promotion tools, analytics, and media management.
projects.tropikala.feature1: Full product menu with category filtering and nutrition details
projects.tropikala.feature2: Shopping cart with real time item management
projects.tropikala.feature3: Admin dashboard with order tracking and analytics
projects.tropikala.feature5: Smoothie catalog management with CRUD operations
projects.tropikala.design1: Vibrant coral and teal tropical palette with warm cream backgrounds for an inviting, energetic feel
projects.tropikala.design2: Dual design contexts: playful customer storefront and data rich admin dashboard sharing one design system
projects.tropikala.mobileNotes: Mobile first responsive design with touch friendly menu browsing, cart drawer, and simplified admin navigation on smaller screens.
projects.tropikala.future1: Online ordering with real time kitchen status and pickup scheduling
projects.tropikala.future2: Loyalty points and rewards program integration
projects.tropikala.future3: Delivery integration with third party providers
projects.sage.name: Sage & Stone Wellness
projects.sage.summary: A premium spa management platform with customer booking, membership programs, and a full admin dashboard for business operations.
projects.sage.businessProblem: Med spas and wellness businesses juggle booking systems, membership tracking, gift card management, and marketing, often across disconnected tools with no unified platform.
projects.sage.overview: Sage & Stone Wellness is a comprehensive spa and wellness management platform featuring a premium customer facing website with booking capabilities and a full admin dashboard. It includes membership programs, gift cards, consultation requests, service management, lead tracking, and business analytics, all in one unified system.
projects.sage.challenge: Building a platform that serves both customers and business operators equally well. The customer experience needed to feel luxurious and calming, while the admin dashboard required powerful data management and analytics without feeling overwhelming.
projects.sage.solution: A dual experience tenant application: the customer facing side features a serene sage green/taupe palette with serif headings (Playfair Display) for a spa like premium feel, while the admin portal provides KPI dashboards, booking management, lead tracking, and promotional tools, all sharing the same design system.
projects.sage.feature1: Multi service booking with category filtering
projects.sage.feature3: Gift card purchasing and redemption flow
projects.sage.feature4: Admin dashboard with KPIs, charts, and analytics
projects.sage.design1: Calming sage green palette with serif typography for a premium spa aesthetic
projects.sage.design2: Dual design contexts: serene customer facing and data rich admin dashboard sharing one system
projects.sage.mobileNotes: Fully responsive across all breakpoints. The customer booking flow is optimized for mobile with sticky CTAs and simplified navigation. Admin dashboard reorganizes from multi column to stacked layouts on tablet and phone.
projects.sage.future1: Real time appointment availability with calendar sync
projects.sage.future2: Automated email and SMS appointment reminders
projects.sage.future4: Customer portal with visit history and preferences
projects.ironoak.name: Iron & Oak Barbershop
projects.ironoak.summary: An upscale barbershop experience with an online booking system, service showcase, barber profiles, and a polished dark-mode design built for the modern gentleman.
projects.ironoak.businessProblem: Traditional barbershops rely on walk-ins and phone calls, missing out on clients who expect to book online. Without a digital presence, they struggle to showcase their services, barbers, and brand identity to new customers.
projects.ironoak.overview: Iron & Oak Barbershop is a demo application showcasing a premium digital presence for an upscale barbershop. It features a cinematic hero carousel, service menu with pricing, barber profiles, and a complete 3-step booking wizard, all wrapped in a sophisticated dark-mode design with gold accents built on the Bluebonnet Tech core platform.
projects.ironoak.challenge: Creating a booking experience that feels as premium as the barbershop itself. The app needed to convey craftsmanship and tradition through its design while providing a modern, frictionless booking flow that guides customers from service selection through barber choice to appointment confirmation.
projects.ironoak.solution: A single-page application with a rich, immersive dark-mode aesthetic using gold accents and serif typography to evoke a classic gentleman's experience. The 3-step booking wizard walks customers through service selection, barber choice, date/time picking, and contact details with real-time validation and a polished confirmation screen.
projects.ironoak.feature1: Cinematic hero carousel with 5 professional barbershop images and auto-rotation
projects.ironoak.feature2: 4 service cards with pricing and detailed descriptions
projects.ironoak.feature3: 3-step booking wizard with service, barber, date/time, and contact details
projects.ironoak.feature4: Barber profiles with specialties, bios, and avatar selection
projects.ironoak.feature5: Real-time availability grid with day and time slot selection
projects.ironoak.feature6: Booking confirmation with personalized summary and animated success screen
projects.ironoak.design1: Dark-mode palette with gold accents and Playfair Display serif headings for a premium, masculine aesthetic
projects.ironoak.design2: Glassmorphic navigation bar with scroll-triggered backdrop blur and floating book-now action button
projects.ironoak.mobileNotes: Fully responsive mobile-first design with hamburger navigation drawer, touch-friendly carousel with swipe support, and a persistent floating Book Now button for easy access on any screen size.
projects.ironoak.future1: Real-time calendar sync with barber availability and Google Calendar integration
projects.ironoak.future2: SMS appointment reminders and automated follow-up messages
projects.ironoak.future3: Loyalty program with visit tracking and referral rewards
pricing.headline: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Professional web solutions tailored to your business needs. No hidden fees, no surprises.
pricing.basic.name: Basic Presence
pricing.basic.description: A clean, professional website for small businesses ready to establish their online presence.
pricing.growth.name: Business Growth
pricing.growth.description: For businesses that need active site updates, fresh content, and integrations to drive engagement.
pricing.control.name: Business Control
pricing.control.description: For businesses that want hands-on control with a simple admin dashboard to manage their own content.
pricing.custom.title: Custom Solutions
pricing.custom.description: Need a custom booking system, client dashboard, business portal, or multi-location platform? Advanced features and custom applications are scoped and quoted separately based on your requirements.
process.headline: From Idea to Launch
process.subtitle: A clear, collaborative process designed to move fast without cutting corners.
process.discover.title: Discover
process.discover.description: We start with your business goals, target users, and technical requirements. I research the landscape and define what success looks like.
process.design.title: Design
process.design.description: Wireframes, component architecture, and visual direction come together. You see the product take shape before a single line of code is written.
process.build.title: Build
process.build.description: Clean, modular code built on proven frameworks. Regular check ins keep the project on track and aligned with your vision.
process.launch.title: Launch
process.launch.description: Thorough testing, performance optimization, and deployment. Your product goes live with confidence, and I stay available for what comes next.
contact.headline: Ready to Build Something Great?
contact.subtitle: Whether you need a new product from scratch, a redesign that actually converts, or a polished demo to win your next client, I'd love to hear about your project.
footer.tagline: Polished digital products built for real businesses.
caseStudy.ctaSubtitle: Let's talk about how I can build something like this for your business.
notFound.headline: Page Not Found
notFound.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
